Sample RFP Document for Testing
================================

Project: Healthcare Management System

1. FUNCTIONAL REQUIREMENTS

FR-001: User Authentication
The system MUST provide secure user authentication using multi-factor authentication.
Priority: MUST HAVE

FR-002: Patient Records Management
The system MUST allow healthcare providers to create, read, update, and delete patient records.
Priority: MUST HAVE

FR-003: Appointment Scheduling
The system SHOULD provide an appointment scheduling interface for patients and staff.
Priority: SHOULD HAVE

FR-004: Prescription Management
The system MUST support electronic prescription creation and management.
Priority: MUST HAVE

2. NON-FUNCTIONAL REQUIREMENTS

NFR-001: Performance
The system MUST respond to user requests within 2 seconds under normal load.
Priority: MUST HAVE

NFR-002: Security
The system MUST comply with HIPAA regulations for patient data protection.
Priority: MUST HAVE

NFR-003: Availability
The system SHOULD maintain 99.9% uptime during business hours.
Priority: SHOULD HAVE

NFR-004: Scalability
The system MUST support up to 10,000 concurrent users.
Priority: MUST HAVE

3. COMPLIANCE REQUIREMENTS

COMP-001: HIPAA Compliance
All patient data must be encrypted at rest and in transit.

COMP-002: GDPR Compliance
System must provide data export and deletion capabilities for patients.

4. TECHNICAL REQUIREMENTS

TECH-001: Platform
The system should be web-based and accessible via modern browsers.

TECH-002: Database
The system must use a HIPAA-compliant database solution.

TECH-003: Integration
The system should integrate with existing EHR systems via HL7 FHIR.

5. TIMELINE

Project Duration: 12 months
Phase 1 (Requirements & Design): 2 months
Phase 2 (Development): 6 months
Phase 3 (Testing & Deployment): 4 months

6. BUDGET

Total Budget: $500,000 - $750,000
